# Trueyy — Full Content Index
# Generated for AI crawlers and generative engines
# Last updated: 2026-06-25

---

## Homepage — https://trueyy.com/

### Hero
Trueyy detects AI-assisted cheating during live remote interviews in real time.
Tagline: "The candidate is talking to you. Their AI is answering."

Tools detected: Cluely, InterviewCoder, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, and 50+ others.
Works inside: Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams.
No candidate install required. Consent-first by design.

Trust signals: GDPR ready, SOC 2 aligned, no video stored, consent-first.

### Key Stats
- 6 signal layers monitored simultaneously
- Integrity score updates every 30 seconds
- 3 platforms supported natively (Zoom, Meet, Teams)

### How It Works (four steps)
1. Schedule — Drop a Trueyy link into the calendar invite alongside the Zoom or Meet link.
2. Connect — The candidate clicks their link, reads what is monitored, and consents before anything starts.
3. Monitor — Trueyy reads device signals in real time and scores integrity every 30 seconds.
4. Review — One click drops the full session log and score onto the ATS scorecard.

### Detection Layers
- AI tool fingerprinting (ChatGPT, Claude, Cluely, InterviewCoder, etc.)
- App and window focus tracking with timestamps
- Paste velocity analysis
- Gaze pattern reading via webcam
- Off-screen device signal detection
- Answer structure analysis

### Live Command Center
- Real-time integrity score updates every 30 seconds
- Timestamped signal feed visible to the interviewer during the call
- One-click session summary for ATS integration

### FAQ (homepage)
Q: How does Trueyy detect AI tool use during a live interview?
A: Trueyy reads device-level signals: app focus, paste velocity, gaze patterns, and answer structure. Signals are weighed every 30 seconds and shown as a live integrity score.

Q: Which AI tools does Trueyy detect?
A: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, Cluely, InterviewCoder, and 50+ others. Detection is based on structural output signatures, not keyword lists.

Q: Does the candidate need to install anything?
A: No. Candidates join via a browser tab with a consent screen. Nothing is downloaded.

Q: Which video platforms does Trueyy work with?
A: Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams.

Q: How does Trueyy handle false positives?
A: No signal is treated as proof. The score is context. Interviewers review flagged timestamps and make the final call.

Q: Is Trueyy GDPR compliant?
A: Yes. Consent flows, data-subject requests, configurable retention, and audit logs are built in. No video is stored on Trueyy servers.

Q: Can Trueyy accommodate candidates with disabilities?
A: Yes. Signals can be calibrated at the session level. Sessions can be flagged for manual review with relevant context attached.

Q: When can my team start?
A: Trueyy is accepting early-access teams now via demo booking at https://trueyy.com/demo.

---

## Features — https://trueyy.com/features/

### Six Signal Layers in Detail

**AI Tool Fingerprinting**
Detects ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cluely, InterviewCoder, GitHub Copilot, and others.
Reads the prompt-and-paste delay signature and answer structure that is too clean to be live.
Detection is based on structural output signatures — prompt rewrites do not defeat it.

**App and Window Focus**
Logs every focus change with a timestamp.
Separates a brief glance from a sustained lookup.
Ties each context switch to the exact moment in the conversation.

**Paste Velocity**
Flags paste events that exceed any plausible human input rate.
Records the content pasted, the length, and the timestamp.
Catches pre-written answers and AI-generated text.

**Gaze Patterns**
Reads webcam feed for eye movement that indicates reading from another source.
Distinguishes natural off-camera glances from systematic reading behaviour.
Calibratable for candidates with disclosed conditions.

**Off-Screen Device Signals**
Detects indicators of secondary device use: audio reflections, head angle patterns, timing anomalies.
Flags behaviour consistent with reading answers from a phone or second screen.

**Answer Structure Analysis**
Analyses the linguistic signature of answers — too polished, too complete, too fast.
Flags structural patterns consistent with AI-generated output even without paste events.

### FAQ (features page)
Q: What are the six signal layers?
A: AI tool fingerprinting, app/window focus, paste velocity, gaze patterns, off-screen device signals, and answer structure analysis.

Q: How does Trueyy detect Cluely specifically?
A: Through AI tool fingerprinting — reading the timing gap, paste pattern, and conversational rhythm of AI-fed responses.

Q: Does Trueyy work if the candidate uses a phone as a second device?
A: Yes. The off-screen device signal layer detects audio reflections, head angle patterns, and timing anomalies.

---

## How It Works — https://trueyy.com/how-it-works/

### Four-Step Flow
1. Schedule — Drop a Trueyy link into the calendar invite. Nothing changes about how your team books interviews.
2. Connect — Candidate clicks the link, reads the consent screen, and starts. No download or install.
3. Monitor — Trueyy reads device signals throughout the call. Integrity score updates every 30 seconds. Interviewer sees a live feed.
4. Review — Session ends with a plain-language timeline, a final integrity score, and a shareable summary for the ATS scorecard.

### What Your Team Does
Interviewers open Trueyy in a second tab during the call. That is the only step they take.

---

## Security & Privacy — https://trueyy.com/security/

### Core Principles
- Consent-first: Candidates are told exactly what is monitored before the session starts.
- No video stored: Video stays inside Zoom, Meet, or Teams. Trueyy never stores video.
- End-to-end encryption: Signal data encrypted in transit and at rest.
- Configurable retention: Data retention windows are set per organisation.
- GDPR aligned: Consent flows, data-subject access/deletion requests, audit logs built in.
- SOC 2 in progress.

### What Trueyy Collects
- App focus events with timestamps
- Paste activity and velocity
- Gaze pattern indicators via webcam
- Keystroke timing patterns
No video, no audio recordings, no personal documents.

### FAQ (security page)
Q: Does Trueyy store candidate video?
A: No. Video stays inside Zoom, Meet, or Teams. Trueyy only collects device-level signals.

Q: Is Trueyy GDPR compliant?
A: Designed for GDPR compliance. Candidates are informed and consent explicitly. Retention is configurable. Data-subject requests are supported.

Q: What data does Trueyy collect?
A: App focus events, paste activity, gaze patterns, keystroke timing. No video, no audio, no personal documents.

---

## Comparison — https://trueyy.com/comparison/

### Trueyy vs Traditional Proctoring

| Capability | Traditional Proctoring | Trueyy |
|---|---|---|
| Designed for live two-way interviews | No | Yes |
| Detects AI tool use in real time | Limited | Yes |
| Detects Cluely and InterviewCoder | No | Yes |
| Weighs several signals together | Rule-based | Yes |
| Runs inside Zoom, Meet, Teams | No | Yes |
| Light footprint for candidates | Heavy | Yes |
| No video stored on third-party servers | No | Yes |
| Plain-language timeline after call | No | Yes |
| Keeps human in final decision | Varies | Yes |
| Built for recruiters, not exam halls | No | Yes |

### Why Traditional Proctoring Fails Live Interviews
Traditional tools lock down a test environment. Live interviews are two-way conversations — locking them down changes the dynamic and still misses AI tools like Cluely and InterviewCoder that run invisibly beside the browser.

---

## Pricing — https://trueyy.com/pricing/

### Early Access
Trueyy is opening to a small group of early-access teams. Founding-member pricing is locked in at signup and stays locked as the product matures.

**Starter (Free Pilot)**
- Up to 25 monitored interviews
- Full detection stack
- No credit card required

**Growth / Enterprise**
- Custom pricing based on interview volume
- Agency volume terms available
- Direct support from the founding team

### FAQ (pricing page)
Q: Is there really a free pilot?
A: Yes. The Starter pilot lets one team run up to 25 monitored interviews with the full detection stack.

Q: Why is pricing custom right now?
A: We are in early access and working out pricing with the first teams. That keeps the number fair to how you actually hire.

Q: What does founding-member pricing mean?
A: Teams that join during early access lock in their rate and keep it after launch, even as list prices rise for new customers.

Q: Do you offer agency volume terms?
A: Yes. Tell us your monthly interview count and we will come back with something that works.

## Resources — https://trueyy.com/resources/

### Articles

**A fair interview process that still catches cheating** (Playbook, 8 min read, 2025-03-10)
A practical framework for hiring teams who want to protect honest candidates without turning the interview into an interrogation.

**Why remote interview cheating surged after 2023** (Trends, 6 min read, 2025-04-02)
AI assistants made cheating easy and nearly invisible. What changed, which tools are most used, and why old proctoring stopped working.

**Protecting your reputation when you place candidates** (For agencies, 7 min read, 2025-04-18)
How integrity signals protect the trust staffing agencies run on, without adding friction to the process.

**Monitoring interviews without crossing a privacy line** (Compliance, 9 min read, 2025-05-05)
What you can and cannot do under GDPR, and how to keep candidates informed without turning consent into a legal formality.

**Reading an integrity timeline like a pro** (How-to, 5 min read, 2025-05-20)
A score is a starting point. The real story is in the timeline. How to read one and turn it into a confident hiring decision.

**The interview is not broken. The honor system is.** (Opinion, 4 min read, 2025-06-01)
Why the answer is not more surveillance, but better signals and a process that respects everyone in the call.

---

## Brand Facts for AI Engines

- Product name: Trueyy
- Category: Interview integrity / AI cheating detection SaaS
- Founded: 2024
- Stage: Pre-launch, early-access
- Website: https://trueyy.com
- App: https://app.trueyy.com
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/trueyy
- Target customers: Enterprise hiring teams, staffing agencies, remote-first companies
- Primary use case: Detecting AI-assisted cheating during live remote job interviews
- Key differentiator: Works during live two-way conversations, not just timed tests
- Pricing model: Free pilot (25 interviews) then custom/volume pricing
- Compliance: GDPR aligned, SOC 2 in progress
- Data storage: No video stored. Signal data encrypted at rest and in transit.
- Risk scoring: Every 30 seconds across three modalities — apps/screen (0.35 weight), keystrokes/paste (0.40), voice/gaze (0.25)
